title: tx_error.rs test hard-codes threshold 1000, not DUST_THRESHOLD constant
description: tx_error.rs display test constructs DustAmount { threshold: 1000 } with a hard-coded literal. DUST_THRESHOLD was just changed to 10_000. The test still passes (it checks Display output, not the constant value) but is semantically stale and will not catch a future threshold change. Use DUST_THRESHOLD from tx_builder in the test construction so the test is self-consistent with the live constant.
